name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, turn

Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ turn' = turn + 1
          /\ turn' <= N
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![turn] = "critical"]
        \/ /\ turn' = turn
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![turn] = "idle"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
        /\ turn \in 1..N

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, FiniteSubsets

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages

TypeOK ==
  /\ participants \in [1..N -> {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}]
  /\ coordinator \in {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}
  /\ messages \in FiniteSubsets({1..N, "Coordinator"} \times {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"})

Init ==
  /\ participants = [i \in 1..N |-> "Init"]
  /\ coordinator = "Init"
  /\ messages = {}

Prepare ==
  /\ coordinator = "Init"
  /\ coordinator' = "Prepared"
  /\ messages' = messages \cup {("Coordinator", "Prepare")}

VoteYes ==
  /\ \A i \in 1..N : participants[i] = "Prepared"
  /\ coordinator = "Prepared"
  /\ coordinator' = "Committed"
  /\ messages' = messages \cup {("Coordinator", "Commit")}

VoteNo ==
  /\ \E i \in 1..N : participants[i] = "Prepared"
  /\ coordinator = "Prepared"
  /\ coordinator' = "Aborted"
  /\ messages' = messages \cup {("Coordinator", "Abort")}

ParticipantVoteYes ==
  /\ \E i \in 1..N : participants[i] = "Init"
  /\ \E i \in 1..N : messages = messages \cup {("Coordinator", "Prepare")}
  /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = "Prepared"]
  /\ messages' = messages

ParticipantVoteNo ==
  /\ \E i \in 1..N : participants[i] = "Init"
  /\ \E i \in 1..N : messages = messages \cup {("Coordinator", "Prepare")}
  /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = "Aborted"]
  /\ messages' = messages

Commit ==
  /\ coordinator = "Committed"
  /\ \E i \in 1..N : participants[i] = "Prepared"
  /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = "Committed"]
  /\ messages' = messages

Abort ==
  /\ coordinator = "Aborted"
  /\ \E i \in 1..N : participants[i] = "Prepared"
  /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = "Aborted"]
  /\ messages' = messages

Next ==
  \/ Prepare
  \/ VoteYes
  \/ VoteNo
  \/ ParticipantVoteYes
  \/ ParticipantVoteNo
  \/ Commit
  \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* Forks: a set of fork indices that are currently free *)
(* State: a mapping from philosopher indices to their state:
   "thinking", "hungry", or "eating" *)

Init == forks = {1..N} /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "thinking"
          /\ forks = forks \cup {i, %(i, N)+1}
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks = forks \ {i, %(i, N)+1}
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks = forks \cup {i, %(i, N)+1}
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({IF flag[j] THEN num[j] ELSE 0 : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
    /\ head \in 1..K
    /\ tail \in 1..K
    /\ size \in 0..K

(* Initial state: empty queue *)
Init == 
    /\ q = <<>>
    /\ head = 1
    /\ tail = 1
    /\ size = 0

(* Producer action: enqueue an element e *)
Enqueue(e) == 
    /\ size < K
    /\ q' = Append(q, e)
    /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
    /\ size' = size + 1
    /\ head' = head

(* Consumer action: dequeue an element *)
Dequeue == 
    /\ size > 0
    /\ q' = Tail(q)
    /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
    /\ size' = size - 1
    /\ tail' = tail

(* Next-state relation: either enqueue or dequeue *)
Next == 
    \E e \in 1..K : Enqueue(e) \/ Dequeue

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init ==
    /\ currentTerm = 0
    /\ votedFor = {}
    /\ state = "Follower"

Next ==
    \/ \E term \in Nat :
        /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = term
        /\ votedFor' = {}
        /\ state' = "Follower"
    \/ \E term \in Nat : \E candidate \in Nat :
        /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = term
        /\ votedFor' = {candidate}
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
    \/ \E term \in Nat : \E candidate \in Nat :
        /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = term
        /\ votedFor' = {candidate}
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====
